body.answer_1: The harder I pushed for control,   the less I actually had.
body.answer_2: I measured success by exhaustion and called it discipline.
body.answer_3: Letting go of the plan was the moment the business finally grew.
body.answer_4: Trust compounds faster than effort ever will.
body.transparency_answer: I almost did not admit that I nearly shut the whole thing down last winter.
body.additional_info: Please keep the tone warm and direct.
